title: Orient and Specialize
motivation: Understand the collective knowledge and ongoing work, then define a niche and claim first world goal.

goals.title: Read shared context
goals.description: Read world/program.md (The Program — shared purpose), world/knowledge/tree/_tree.yaml (what is collectively known), world/pipeline.jsonl (active hypotheses), and world/aspirations.jsonl (what is in progress and who is working on what). Load key context into working memory.

outcomes: Working memory has world context loaded
Agent understands the shared program purpose and current state of collective knowledge

goals.title: Define my identity
goals.description: Based on world context and user input from /start, identify gaps and underserved areas in the collective knowledge and ongoing work. Write self.md with a clear role and specialization that complements existing agents.

outcomes: Agent self.md exists with specialization defined
Specialization complements existing agents and addresses identified gaps

goals.title: Claim first world goal
goals.description: Select an unclaimed world goal from world/aspirations.jsonl that aligns with this agent's specialization. Claim it and begin execution. If no suitable unclaimed goals exist, propose a new world aspiration via /create-aspiration.

outcomes: At least one world goal has claimed_by set to this agent
